RESQUER 0.10.4
  • Reference
    • How to read the radarcharts of the relative rigor score (RRS)

    Wiggle a number by a random ±margin%

    Source: R/helpers.R
    wiggle.Rd

    Adds a uniformly-distributed random perturbation of up to ±margin% to x, returning the result rounded to the same number of decimal places as the original value.

    Usage

    wiggle(x, margin = 10)

    Arguments

    x

    A numeric scalar to wiggle.

    margin

    Maximum percentage perturbation (default: 10).

    Value

    A numeric scalar with the same number of decimal places as x.

    Examples

    set.seed(42)
wiggle(0.25)        # e.g. 0.27 (still 2 decimal places)
#> [1] 0.27
wiggle(1.5, margin = 20)  # e.g. 1.4 (still 1 decimal place)
#> [1] 1.8
wiggle(3)           # e.g. 3 (still 0 decimal places)
#> [1] 3
